homePage.heroText: Experience the future of smart pizza ordering with automation, customization, and fast preparation.
homePage.description: Experience the future of smart pizza ordering. Ultra-fast, visually immersive, and intelligently crafted. Log in or register to unlock a premium dashboard with real-time insights.
homePage.feature1Text: Customize your pizza through a simple and interactive website.
homePage.feature2Text: Your order is sent to a smart pizza-making machine.
homePage.feature3Text: From order to preparation, everything is designed to save time.

loginPage.title: Welcome Back
loginPage.subtitle: Login to continue your Pizza Go experience.

orderPage.subtitle: Customize your pizza, choose your toppings, and watch your price update instantly.

successPage.title: Order placed successfully
